name: Alice B. Dupont
description: Light Yellow. Small, semidouble. Very slow, compact growth. M-L. (Nitidissima × Hybrid 'Golden Glow'). (U.S. 2008 - CamelliaShop, Savannah, GA).

name: Canary
description: White. Small, anemone form with Yellow petaloids. M. (U.S. 1962 - Rogerson, Florence, SC).

name: Dahlohnega
description: Canary Yellow. Small to medium, formal double. Slow, open, upright growth. M. (U.S. 1986. Homeyer).

name: Golden Glow
description: Creamy White deepening to Light Yellow at base with edge and back of petals slightly toned Pink. Medium, semidouble. Average, dense, upright growth. L. (Japonica 'Guilio Nuccio' × Pitardii] * Chrysantha). (U.S. 1994 - Nuccio's).

name: Gus Menard
description: White with Canary Yellow petaloids. Large, anemone form with center petals divided by petaloids. Average, upright growth. M. (U.S. 1962 - Judice).

name: Gwenneth Morey
description: White outer petals and Deep Cream to Pale Primrose Yellow petaloids. Medium, anemone form. Average, upright growth. M-L. See also 'Brushfield's Yellow' which is similar but not identical. (Aus. 1965 - Dr. B. R. Morey, Carlingford).

name: Jaune
description: White with large center of Yellow petaloids and a few stamens of Darker Yellow. Small, anemone form. (China to France, 1850 - Fortune's Yellow Camellia).

name: Jinhua's Jade Tray
description: ('Yupan Jinhua' - Chinese name). White to Light Pink or Yellowish with Green tone, edged with Pink with Yellow anthers and Yellow filaments. Large to very large, anemone to peony form; petals broad and wrinkled or serrated at the edges and waved; a large number of petaloids mixed with stamens forming a central raised ball. Vigorous, upright growth. E-L. Sweetly fragrant. (Williamsii x fragrant cultivar). (U.S. 2007 - John Wang, Orinda, CA).

name: Jury's Yellow
description: White with Cream-Yellow petaloids. Medium, anemone form. Average, compact, upright growth. E-L. (Saluenensis/ Japonica hybrid × Japonica 'Gwenneth Morey'). (N.Z. 1976 - Jury).

name: Kagirohi (First Light Of Dawn)
description: Pale Yellow. Small to medium, formal double. Upright growth. L. (Nitidissima x Japonica 'Silver Chalice'). (Japan 1996 - Kazuo Yoshikawa, Ishikawa).

name: Ki-No-Gozen
description: Light Yellow. Small to medium, single cup- shaped with thick petals. Vigorous, upright growth. (Japonica 'Jomanji' x Nitidissima). (U.S. 1990 - Nuccio's hybridizer Tadao Yamaguchi, Japan).

name: Ki-No-Moto No.95
description: Light Yellow. Large, semidouble. Slow, upright growth. M-L. (Reticulata hybrid 'LASCA Beauty' × Japonica). (U.S. - Nuccio's Hybridizer Kazuo Yoshikawa, Japan).

name: Ki-no-senritsu
description: Color: Soft light yellow. Form: Peony to loose peony form. Size: Small to medium. Bloom Season: M. Growth Rate: Average. Growth Characteristics: Open growth. Leaf Characteristics: Medium green - Japonica-like. Originator: Tadao Yamaguchi. Place of Origination: Japan - Ishikawa. Year of Registration / Origination: 1998. Heritage: Nitidissima x Japonica 'Hakuhï¿½'. Other Information: Means  'Yellow Melody' in English.

name: Kicho
description: Pale Yellow. Small, tubular single. Vigorous, upright growth. (Japonica 'Hatsu-Arashi' x Nitidissima). (U.S. 1990 - Nuccio's hybridizer Tadao Yamaguchi, Japan).

name: Kiho
description: Light Yellow. Small to medium, single with tubular, wavy petals. Vigorous, upright growth. E-M. (U.S. 1990 - Nuccio's hybridizer Tadao Yamaguchi, Japan).

name: Kogane-Yuri
description: Light Yellow. Small, single tubular form. Medium, upright, slender growth. M. (Saluenensis-Reticulata hybrid 'Barbara Clark' × Nitidissima). (U.S. - Nuccio's Hybridizer Kazuo Yoshikawa, Japan).

name: Lemon Drop
description: White with Lemon center. Miniature, anemone form to rose form double to formal double. Average, dense, upright growth. M. (U.S. 1981 - Nuccio's).

name: Lemon Glow
description: Creamy Yellow. Small to medium, formal double. Slow, upright, compact growth. M. (Sport of Japonica 'Dahlohnega'). (U.S. 2009 - Cam Too Camellia Nursery, Greensboro, NC).

name: Lemon Twist
description: Off White to Pale Yellow, deeper at center. Medium, semidouble. Vigorous, somewhat open, upright growth. L. (Japonica 'Guilio Nuccio' × Pitardii × Nitidissima). (U.S. 1996 - Nuccio's).

name: Nobilissima
description: ('Fuji-Yama'). White with Yellow shading. Medium, full peony form. Vigorous, upright growth. E-M. (Belgium 1834 - M. Lefevre, Ghent).

name: Optical Illusion
description: Yellow with Pink overtones. Medium, formal double with strap-like petals that can be arranged in a somewhat spiral pattern. (Flava x Japonica). (U.S. 2015 - Parks).

name: Senritsu-Ko
description: Light Yellow edges toned Pink. Small to medium, formal double to rose form double. Moderate, upright, open growth. M. (Hybrid 'Kiho' x Nitidissima). (Japan 2007 - Tadao Yamaguchi, Ishikawa).

name: Shoko
description: Light Yellow. Small, single with thick petals. Vigorous, open, upright growth. E-M. (U.S. 1989 - Nuccio's hybridizer Tadao Yamaguchi, Japan).

name: Solstice
description: Light Yellow. Medium, rose form double. Vigorous, upright growth with narrow Light Green leaves with long leaf tips. (Flava x Japonica). (U.S. 2009 - Parks).
